instructions: Conventions for this monorepo live in AGENTS.md (root) and packages/<name>/AGENTS.md (per package). Those files are the single source of truth — review against them, flag deviations, do not restate them. ESLint and scripts/check-dagger-hygiene.ts enforce mechanical rules separately; assume those pass and focus on architectural, secret-hygiene, and process issues (TODO format, temporal-agent-task block schema, Bun-runtime API preferences, fail-fast over silent fallbacks, Prisma teardown in tests, K8s/cdk8s patterns).
ignorePatterns:
# Generated / build output
node_modules/
dist/
build/
.build/
coverage/
.next/
.astro/
.turbo/
*.tsbuildinfo
bun.lock
*.lock

# Archives & legacy
archive/
packages/docs/archive/**

# Practice / POC
practice/**
**/poc/**

# High-churn session docs (logs & todos only — other docs are reviewable)
packages/docs/logs/**
packages/docs/todos/**

# Obsidian vault (personal)
obsidian/**

# Generated / personal data
packages/birmel/data/**
packages/birmel/prisma/data/**
packages/monarch/src/lib/costco/costco-orders.json
packages/webring/docs/**
packages/cooklang-rich-preview/.astro/**
packages/cooklang-for-obsidian/main.js
obsidian/.obsidian/plugins/**/main.js

# Test artifacts
test-results/
.playwright-mcp/
**/__snapshots__/**

# Generated types / Prisma clients
**/helm-types/**/generated/**
**/.prisma/**
**/node_modules/.prisma/**
